projectDescription: A feature-rich, community-driven custom firmware fork for Flipper Zero that removes regional restrictions, adds new Sub-GHz protocols, NFC parsers, and quality-of-life improvements while maintaining full API compatibility.
keyFeatures: Sub-GHz region lock removal and extended frequency support
Rolling code protocol support (KeeLoq, FAAC SLH, BFT Mitto, Nice FlorS, etc.)
Enhanced NFC with custom parsers for transit cards and EMV
BadUSB/BadKB (BadUSB over Bluetooth) with keyboard layout support
JavaScript scripting engine for building apps without C compilation
FAP (Flipper App Package) system for SD card apps
Customizable desktop, clock display, battery percentage styles
Universal IR remotes for TV, AC, projectors, fans, and audio
GPIO expansion module protocol for third-party hardware
publicApiSurface: ufbt - Micro Flipper Build Tool for single app development
FlipperAppType enum (SERVICE, APP, PLUGIN, EXTERNAL, etc.)
application.fam manifest (App() function with appid, apptype, entry_point, etc.)
JavaScript SDK modules: badusb, gpio, gui, math, notification, serial, storage
Expansion Module Protocol (serial frame-based over GPIO UART)
